options.name: --destination
options.description:
Directory where the new nuglet project will be
created

options.name: --log-severity
options.description:
Log Severity level to output. The values are: Error,
Warning, Information, Debug

options.name: --name
options.description: The name of the nuglet project

options.name: --overwrite
options.description:
If the --name option is specified, clears the directory in
destination with this name

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Time in seconds for each individual command to be executed
before it is aborted
